--- Begin [Pasted text #2 · 48 lines] ---
# Next Milestone — Generalize APK Manager ExtractionThe single-manager IL2CPP extraction proof is accepted.Proceed to generalize the extractor across the full captured manager set.## Required Deliverables1. Move the reusable extraction logic into the version-controlled Data Engine repository.2. Extract a representative sample of at least 8–12 managers covering multiple:   - rarities   - roles   - event/non-event types   - older and newer IDs3. Confirm whether the seven-ScriptableObject pattern is consistent.4. Add graceful handling for:   - missing assets   - optional fields   - duplicate IDs   - partial records   - unknown enum values5. Run a full batch extraction across all discoverable manager IDs.6. Produce:   - managers.json   - extraction-report.json   - unresolved-fields.json   - source-evidence.json7. Add automated tests using sanitized extracted fixtures.8. Do not resume production frontend catalog activation until batch extraction and validation are complete.## Validation Targets- No duplicate canonical IDs- Every extracted manager has a verified gameId- All enum values are preserved or explicitly reported as unknown- Partial records are retained with warnings, not silently discarded- Source paths and evidence are recorded for every extracted field- Extraction failures are machine-readable## Secondary InvestigationContinue investigation of:- localization/name sources- element ID mapping- sprite/portrait relationshipsThese should remain separate subproblems and must not block batch extraction of the metadata already available.
--- End [Pasted text #2 · 48 lines] ---
